name.value: ELZ - Serving XIS - Scenario 3 Minimaal - Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_vanHenegouwen - target CheckContent - JSON Format

description.value: Scenario 3 - Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_vanHenegouwen
OAuth Token for patient 'patient-XXX-vanHenegouwen'
Resource.id for Patient 1
Resource.id for PractitionerRole 1
Resource.id for Consent 1

name.value: Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_vanHenegouwen

description.value: Serve Consent resources of patient XXX_vanHenegouwen
Test server to serve Consent resource.
Confirm that the operation was successful
Confirm that all Coding elements contain both a .system and a .code.
Confirm that the OID of the zib valueset is not used for the system of a coding element.

Confirm that all CodeableConcept elements contain either a coding.display or a text value if no Coding exists or has an extension (e.g. a nullFlavor or data-absent-reason extension). For more information see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3Use_of_coded_concepts.
Confirm that all References have a display value, see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3#Use_of_the_reference_datatype.

Confirm that all Identifiers have both a .system and a .value. In rare cases where a general category of identifiers can be used, .type can replace .system. Edge cases for both .system and .type to be unknown are not applicable to Nictiz. For more information, see https://www.hl7.org/fhir/stu3/datatypes.html#Identifier.

name.value: Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_vanHenegouwen - Check Patient

description.value: Check if the previous operation results in a FHIR Patient that contains the values that are expected following Nictiz' materials (fixture .id: patient-XXX-vanHenegouwen)
Response contains exactly 1 Patient
Patient resource evaluated in the previous assert contains an .id
Contains .meta with .profile 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/nl-core-Patient'
Contains .identifier with .system and .value

Contains .name with .use 'official', and .text with a value, and .family with a value and with .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-vanHenegouwen-id}').name.where(use = 'official' and text.hasValue() and family.where($this.hasValue() and extension('http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name').value.where($this is string).hasValue())).exists()

description.value: Contains .name.use 'official'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .name.text with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

Contains .name.family with a value and with .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats
Contains .name.family with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .name.family.extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .gender 'male' and with .extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AdministrativeGender' and .code 'M' and .display. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-vanHenegouwen-id}').gender.where($this = 'male' and extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AdministrativeGender' and code = 'M' and display)).exists()

description.value: Contains .gender 'male'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .gender.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AdministrativeGender' and .code 'M' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-vanHenegouwen-id}').gender.extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AdministrativeGender' and code = 'M' and display).exists()

description.value: Contains .birthDate

name.value: Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_vanHenegouwen - Check PractitionerRole

description.value: Check if the previous operation results in a FHIR PractitionerRole that contains the values that are expected following Nictiz' materials (fixture .id: pracrole-UZI1)
Response contains exactly 1 PractitionerRole
PractitionerRole resource evaluated in the previous assert contains an .id
Contains .meta with .profile 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/nl-core-HealthProfessional-PractitionerRole'
Contains .practitioner with either .reference or .identifier and .display

Contains .telecom with .system 'phone', and .value with a value. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails
Contains .telecom.system 'phone'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .telecom.value with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

Contains .telecom with .system 'email', and .value with a value. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails
Contains .telecom.system 'email'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .telecom.value with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

name.value: Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_vanHenegouwen - Check Consent

description.value: Check if the previous operation results in a FHIR Consent that contains the values that are expected following Nictiz' materials (fixture .id: td-2025-08-09-40617009)
Response contains exactly 1 Consent
Consent resource evaluated in the previous assert contains an .id
Contains .meta with .profile 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/nl-core-TreatmentDirective2'
Contains .modifierExtension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-TreatmentDirective2.SpecificationOther' with .valueString with a value
Contains .identifier with .system and .value
Contains .status 'active'
Contains .scope with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/consentscope' and .code 'treatment' and .display
Contains .category with .coding with .system 'http://snomed.info/sct' and .code '129125009' and .display
Contains .patient with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .dateTime
Contains .policy with .uri

Contains .provision with .actor with .role with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and .code 'CONSWIT' and .display and .reference with either .reference or .identifier and .display, and .actor with .role with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and .code 'CONSENTER' and .display and .reference with either .reference or .identifier and .display, and .code with .coding with .system 'http://snomed.info/sct' and .code '40617009' and .display. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Consent.where(id = '${td-2025-08-09-40617009-id}').provision.where(actor.where(role.coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and code = 'CONSWIT' and display) and reference.where((reference or identifier) and display)) and actor.where(role.coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and code = 'CONSENTER' and display) and reference.where((reference or identifier) and display)) and code.where(coding.where(system = 'http://snomed.info/sct' and code = '40617009' and display))).exists()

description.value: Contains .provision.actor with .role with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and .code 'CONSWIT' and .display, and .reference with either .reference or .identifier and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Consent.where(id = '${td-2025-08-09-40617009-id}').provision.actor.where(role.coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and code = 'CONSWIT' and display) and reference.where((reference or identifier) and display)).exists()

description.value: Contains .provision.actor.role with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and .code 'CONSWIT' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10-1 checks if all children are present in the same parent
Contains .provision.actor.reference with either .reference or .identifier and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10-1 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .provision.actor with .role with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and .code 'CONSENTER' and .display, and .reference with either .reference or .identifier and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Consent.where(id = '${td-2025-08-09-40617009-id}').provision.actor.where(role.coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and code = 'CONSENTER' and display) and reference.where((reference or identifier) and display)).exists()

description.value: Contains .provision.actor.role with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' and .code 'CONSENTER' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10-2 checks if all children are present in the same parent
Contains .provision.actor.reference with either .reference or .identifier and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10-2 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .provision.code with .coding with .system 'http://snomed.info/sct' and .code '40617009' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-10 checks if all children are present in the same parent
